This is the repo the **grill-with-docs** skill comes from
(`skills/engineering/grill-with-docs`); it ships 14 in-scope skills declared in
`.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, plus deprecated/in-progress/personal/misc skills
that the plugin manifest intentionally excludes.

To refresh: re-clone upstream, copy in, and update the commit/date above.
